title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이거 비싸요? 
여자: 아니요, 안 비싸요. 한 개에 천 원이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cái này có đắt không? 
Nữ: Không, không đắt đâu. Một cái một nghìn won thôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Est-ce cher ?
Femme : Non, ce n'est pas cher. C'est 1 000 won chacun.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Esto es caro?
Mujer: No, no es caro. Son 1.000 wones cada uno.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah ini mahal?
Wanita: Tidak, itu tidak mahal. Ini 1.000 won masing-masing.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：これは高いですか？
女：いいえ、高くないです。それぞれ1000ウォンです。

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ist das teuer?
Frau: Nein, es ist nicht teuer. Es sind jeweils 1.000 Won.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：这个贵吗？
女：不，不贵。每人1000韩元。

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：這個貴嗎？
女：不，不貴。每人1000韓元。

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: È costoso?
Donna: No, non è costoso. Sono 1.000 won ciascuno.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Это дорого?
Женщина: Нет, это не дорого. Это по 1000 вон каждый.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: มันแพงมั้ย?
ผู้หญิง: ไม่ มันไม่แพงเลย อันละ 1,000 วอน

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Isso é caro?
Mulher: Não, não é caro. São 1.000 won cada.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या ये महँगा है?
महिला: नहीं, ये महँगा नहीं है. प्रत्येक में 1,000 जीते गए हैं।

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bu pahalı mı?
Kadın: Hayır, pahalı değil. Tanesi 1000 won.

#######

Man: Is this expensive?
Woman: No, it's not expensive. It's 1,000 won each.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 오늘 회의는 몇 시예요? 
여자: 어제하고 같아요. 세 시예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Hôm nay họp lúc mấy giờ thế? 
Nữ: Giống hôm qua. Ba giờ ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À quelle heure est la réunion aujourd'hui ?
Femme : Comme hier. Trois heures.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿A qué hora es la reunión hoy?
Mujer: Lo mismo que ayer. Tres en punto.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Jam berapa pertemuan hari ini?
Wanita: Sama seperti kemarin. Jam tiga.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 今日の会議は何時ですか?
女：昨日と同じです。三時。

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Um wie viel Uhr ist das Treffen heute?
Frau: Dasselbe wie gestern. Drei Uhr.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：今天几点开会？
女：和昨天一样。三点钟。

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：今天幾點開會？
女：和昨天一樣。三點鐘。

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: A che ora è la riunione oggi?
Donna: Come ieri. Le tre in punto.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Во сколько сегодня встреча?
Женщина: То же, что и вчера. Три часа.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: วันนี้ประชุมกี่โมง?
ผู้หญิง: เหมือนเมื่อวานเลย สามนาฬิกา.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Que horas é a reunião hoje?
Mulher: Igual a ontem. Três horas.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आज मीटिंग कितने बजे है?
महिला: कल जैसा ही. तीन बजे।

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bugünkü toplantı saat kaçta?
Kadın: Dün olduğu gibi. Saat üç.

#######

Man: What time is the meeting today?
Woman: Same as yesterday. Three o'clock.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저는 요리하기를 좋아해요. 민수 씨는요? 
남자: 저는 시간이 있을 때마다 산에 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi thích nấu ăn. Còn Minsoo thì sao? 
Nam: Mỗi khi có thời gian tôi thường đi leo núi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : J'aime cuisiner. Qu'en est-il de Minsoo ?
Homme : Je fais de la randonnée dès que j'en ai le temps.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Me gusta cocinar. ¿Qué pasa con Minsoo?
Hombre: Voy de excursión cada vez que tengo tiempo.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Saya suka memasak. Bagaimana dengan Minsu?
Pria: Saya pergi hiking kapan pun saya punya waktu.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：料理が好きです。ミンスは？
男性：時間があればハイキングに行きます。

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Ich koche gerne. Was ist mit Minsoo?
Mann: Ich gehe wandern, wann immer ich Zeit habe.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我喜欢做饭。敏秀呢？
男：我一有时间就去远足。

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我喜歡做飯。敏秀呢？
男：我一有時間就去遠足。

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Mi piace cucinare. E Minsoo?
Uomo: Faccio escursioni ogni volta che ho tempo.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Я люблю готовить. А что насчет Минсу?
Мужчина: Я хожу в поход, когда есть время.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันชอบทำอาหาร แล้วมินซูล่ะ?
ผู้ชาย: ผมไปเดินป่าทุกครั้งที่มีเวลา

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Gosto de cozinhar. E Minsoo?
Homem: Faço caminhadas sempre que tenho tempo.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मुझे खाना बनाना पसंद है. मिन्सू के बारे में क्या?
आदमी: जब भी मेरे पास समय होता है तो मैं लंबी पैदल यात्रा पर जाता हूं।

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Yemek yapmayı seviyorum. Peki ya Minsoo?
Adam: Vakit buldukça yürüyüşe çıkıyorum.

#######

Woman: I like cooking. What about Minsoo?
Man: I go hiking whenever I have time.

general.g_text_audio:

여자: 네. 내일은 한글날이라서 쉬어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ngày mai là ngày nghỉ đúng không? 
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Mai là ngày kỉ niệm ra đời bộ chữ Hangul nên chúng ta được nghỉ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Demain est un jour de congé, n'est-ce pas ?
Femme : C'est vrai. Demain, c'est le jour du Hangeul, nous avons donc un jour de congé.

#######

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Mañana es un día libre, ¿verdad?
Mujer: Así es. Mañana es el Día del Hangeul, así que tenemos un día libre.

#######

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Besok adalah hari libur, kan?
Wanita: Itu benar. Besok adalah Hari Hangeul, jadi kami libur.

#######

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

女性：そうです。明日はハングルの日なのでお休みです。

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

#######

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.

Man: Tomorrow is a day off, right?
Woman: That's right. Tomorrow is Hangeul Day, so we have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Mulher: Isso mesmo. Amanhã é o Dia do Hangeul, então temos um dia de folga.

title: [11～14]다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이거 언제 찍은 거예요? 
여자: 작년에 제주도에서 찍은 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cái này được chụp khi nào thế? 
Nữ: Nó được chụp vào năm ngoái ở đảo Jeju.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Quand a-t-elle été prise ?
Femme : Elle a été prise l'année dernière sur l'île de Jeju.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cuándo se tomó esto?
Mujer: Fue tomada el año pasado en la isla de Jeju.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Kapan ini diambil?
Wanita: Itu diambil tahun lalu di pulau Jeju.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：これはいつ撮ったの？
女：去年、済州島で撮ったものです。

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wann wurde das aufgenommen?
Frau: Es wurde letztes Jahr auf der Insel Jeju aufgenommen.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：这是什么时候拍的？
女：去年在济州岛拍的。

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：這是什麼時候拍的？
女：去年在濟州島拍的。

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quando è stata scattata?
Donna: È stata scattata l'anno scorso sull'isola di Jeju.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Когда это было сделано?
Женщина: Это было сделано в прошлом году на острове Чеджу.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: นี่ถ่ายเมื่อไหร่?
ผู้หญิง: ถ่ายเมื่อปีที่แล้วที่เกาะเชจู

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quando isso foi tirado?
Mulher: Foi tirada no ano passado na ilha de Jeju.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: यह कब लिया गया था?
महिला: यह पिछले साल जेजू द्वीप में लिया गया था।

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bu ne zaman çekildi?
Kadın: Geçen yıl Jeju adasında çekildi.

#######

Man: When was this taken?
Woman: It was taken last year in Jeju island.

title: [11～14]다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 책상, 의자, 옷장,... 방에 필요한 것은 거의 다 있네요. 
남자: 네. 침대만 사면 될 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bàn học, ghế, tủ quần áo,... Trong phòng có gần hết những đồ cần thiết rồi nhỉ. 
Nam: Ừ. Chỉ cần mua giường nữa thôi là được.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : bureau, chaise, placard, etc. Presque tout ce dont vous avez besoin dans la pièce est là.
Homme : Oui. Vous n'aurez qu'à acheter un lit.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Escritorio, silla, armario, etc. Casi todo lo que necesitas en la habitación está ahí.
Hombre: Sí. Solo tendrás que comprar una cama.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Meja, kursi, lemari, dll. Hampir semua yang Anda butuhkan di kamar ada di sana.
Pria: Ya. Anda hanya perlu membeli tempat tidur.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 机、椅子、クローゼットなど、部屋に必要なものはほとんど揃っています。
男: はい。ベッドを買うしかありません。

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Schreibtisch, Stuhl, Schrank usw. Fast alles, was man im Zimmer braucht, ist da.
Mann: Ja. Sie müssen nur ein Bett kaufen.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女人：桌子、椅子、壁橱等。房间里几乎所有你需要的东西都在那里。
男：是的。你只需要买一张床。

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女人：桌子、椅子、壁櫥等。房間裡幾乎所有你需要的東西都在那裡。
男：是的。你只需要買一張床。

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: scrivania, sedia, armadio, ecc. C'è quasi tutto ciò di cui hai bisogno nella stanza.
Uomo: Sì. Dovrai solo comprare un letto.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Рабочий стол, стул, шкаф и т. д. В комнате есть почти все необходимое.
Мужчина: Да. Вам останется только купить кровать.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: โต๊ะ เก้าอี้ ตู้เสื้อผ้า ฯลฯ เกือบทุกอย่างที่คุณต้องการในห้องก็มีอยู่แล้ว
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. คุณจะต้องซื้อเตียง

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Mesa, cadeira, armário, etc. Quase tudo que você precisa no quarto está lá.
Homem: Sim. Você só terá que comprar uma cama.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: डेस्क, कुर्सी, अलमारी, आदि। कमरे में आपकी जरूरत की लगभग सभी चीजें मौजूद हैं।
आदमी: हाँ. आपको बस एक बिस्तर खरीदना होगा।

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Çalışma masası, sandalye, dolap vb. Odada ihtiyacınız olan hemen hemen her şey mevcut.
Adam: Evet. Sadece bir yatak satın almanız gerekecek.

#######

Woman: Desk, chair, closet, etc. Almost everything you need in the room is there.
Man: Yes. You'll just have to buy a bed.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 점심 드셨어요? 
남자: 네. 김밥 먹었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh đã ăn trưa chưa? 
Nam: Vâng. Tôi đã ăn cơm cuộn rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous déjeuné ?
Homme : Oui. J'ai mangé du kimbap.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Almorzaste?
Hombre: Sí. Comí kimbap.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda sudah makan siang?
Pria: Ya. Saya makan kimbap.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：昼食は食べましたか？
男: はい。キムパプを食べました。


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Hast du zu Mittag gegessen?
Mann: Ja. Ich habe Kimbap gegessen.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：吃午饭了吗？
男：是的。我吃了紫菜包饭。


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：吃午飯了嗎？
男：是的。我吃了紫菜包飯。


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Hai pranzato?
Uomo: Sì. Ho mangiato kimbap.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Вы обедали?
Мужчина: Да. Я ел кимбап.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง : กินข้าวเที่ยงหรือยัง?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. ฉันกินคิมบับ

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या तुमने दोपहर का भोजन किया?
आदमी: हाँ. मैंने किम्बैप खा लिया.


#######

Woman: Did you have lunch?
Man: Yes. I ate kimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Öğle yemeği yedin mi?
Adam: Evet. Kimbap'ı yedim.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이번 생일에 뭘 받고 싶어요? 
여자: 컴퓨터를 받고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cô muốn nhận được gì vào sinh nhật lần này? 
Nữ: Tôi muốn nhận được máy vi tính.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que veux-tu offrir pour ton anniversaire cette année ?
Femme : Je veux avoir un ordinateur.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué quieres que te regalen por tu cumpleaños este año?
Mujer: Quiero conseguir una computadora.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang ingin Anda dapatkan untuk ulang tahun Anda tahun ini?
Wanita: Saya ingin mendapatkan komputer.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 今年の誕生日に何をもらいたいですか?
女：パソコンが欲しいです。


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was möchtest du dieses Jahr zum Geburtstag bekommen?
Frau: Ich möchte mir einen Computer zulegen.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：今年生日想送什么礼物？
女：我想买台电脑。


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：今年生日想送什麼禮物？
女：我想買台電腦。


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa vuoi ricevere per il tuo compleanno quest'anno?
Donna: Voglio avere un computer.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что ты хочешь подарить на свой день рождения в этом году?
Женщина: Я хочу купить компьютер.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: วันเกิดปีนี้คุณอยากได้อะไร?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันอยากได้คอมพิวเตอร์

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.

Mulher: Quero um computador.

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.

आदमी: इस साल आप अपने जन्मदिन पर क्या लाना चाहते हैं?
महिला: मुझे एक कंप्यूटर लेना है.


#######

Man: What do you want to get for your birthday this year?
Woman: I want to get a computer.

Kadın: Bilgisayar almak istiyorum.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 여기서 서울역까지 가는 버스가 있어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Is there a bus from here to Seoul Station?
Woman: There is no direct bus, so please take the subway.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Il n'y a pas de bus direct, veuillez donc prendre le métro.

Woman: There is no direct bus, so please take the subway.

Mujer: No hay autobús directo, así que tome el metro.

title: [11～14]다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 동생은 몇 살이에요? 
여자: 저보다 2살 적어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Em bạn bao nhiêu tuổi? 
Nữ: Nhỏ hơn tôi hai tuổi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Quel âge a votre jeune frère/sœur ?
Femme : Deux ans de moins que moi.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué edad tiene tu hermano/hermana menor?
Mujer: Dos años menor que yo.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Berapa umur adik laki-laki / perempuan Anda?
Wanita: Dua tahun lebih muda dari saya.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: あなたの弟/妹は何歳ですか?
女性：私より2つ年下です。

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie alt ist Ihr jüngerer Bruder/Ihre jüngere Schwester?
Frau: Zwei Jahre jünger als ich.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你弟弟/妹妹多大了？
女：比我小两岁。

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：你弟弟/妹妹多大了？
女：比我小兩歲。

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanti anni ha tuo fratello/sorella minore?
Donna: Due anni più giovane di me.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сколько лет твоему младшему брату/сестре?
Женщина: На два года моложе меня.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: น้องชาย/น้องสาวของคุณอายุเท่าไหร่?
ผู้หญิง: อายุน้อยกว่าฉันสองปี

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quantos anos tem seu irmão/irmã mais novo?
Mulher: Dois anos mais nova que eu.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आपका छोटा भाई/बहन कितने साल का है?
महिला: मुझसे दो साल छोटी.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Küçük erkek/kız kardeşin kaç yaşında?
Kadın: Benden iki yaş küçük.

#######

Man: How old is your younger brother/sister?
Woman: Two years younger than me.

title: [11～14]다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 서울에서 태어났어요? 
여자: 아니요, 부산에서요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn sinh ra ở Seoul à? 
Nữ: Không, tôi sinh ra ở Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Êtes-vous né à Séoul ?
Femme : Non, je suis née à Busan.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Naciste en Seúl?
Mujer: No, nací en Busan.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah Anda lahir di Seoul?
Wanita: Tidak, saya lahir di Busan.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：ソウル生まれ？
女：いいえ、釜山生まれです。


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wurden Sie in Seoul geboren?
Frau: Nein, ich bin in Busan geboren.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

女：不，我出生在釜山。

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

女：不，我出生在釜山。

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: No, sono nata a Busan.

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Вы родились в Сеуле?
Женщина: Нет, я родилась в Пусане.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Mulher: Não, nasci em Busan.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या आपका जन्म सियोल में हुआ था?
महिला: नहीं, मेरा जन्म बुसान में हुआ था.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Seul'de mi doğdun?
Kadın: Hayır, Busan'da doğdum.


#######

Man: Were you born in Seoul?
Woman: No, I was born in Busan.

title: [11～14]다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 형제가 있어요? 
남자: 네. 동생이 한 명 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh có anh em không? 
Nam: Có. Tôi có một người em.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous des frères ou des sœurs ?
Homme : Oui. J'ai un petit frère/sœur.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Tienes hermanos o hermanas?
Hombre: Sí. Tengo un hermano/hermana menor.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda memiliki saudara laki-laki atau perempuan?
Pria: Ya. Saya memiliki seorang adik laki-laki / perempuan.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：兄弟姉妹はいますか。
男: はい。私には弟/妹がいます。

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Haben Sie Brüder oder Schwestern?
Mann: Ja. Ich habe einen jüngeren Bruder/eine jüngere Schwester.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你有兄弟姐妹吗？
男：是的。我有一个弟弟/妹妹。

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你有兄弟姐妹嗎？
男：是的。我有一個弟弟/妹妹。

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Hai fratelli o sorelle?
Uomo: Sì. Ho un fratello/sorella minore.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Мужчина: Да. У меня есть младший брат/сестра.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

ผู้ชาย: ใช่. ฉันมีน้องชาย/น้องสาว

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Homem: Sim. Eu tenho um irmão/irmã mais novo.

#######

Woman: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

आदमी: हाँ. मेरा एक छोटा भाई/बहन है.

Man: Yes. I have a younger brother/sister.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 내일 쇼핑하러 갈까요?

Man: Sumi, shall we go shopping tomorrow?
Woman: Okay. See you at 2 o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 바람이 많이 불어요. 
여자: 네. 비도 올 것 같아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Gió thổi to quá. 
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Chắc sắp mưa rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:

Woman: Yes. I think it will rain too.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

#######

g_text_audio_translate.es:

#######

g_text_audio_translate.ja:

#######

Man: It's very windy.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 몇 시에 학교에 가요? 
여자: 열 시에 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cậu đi học lúc mấy giờ? 
Nữ: Tớ đi lúc mười giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À quelle heure vas-tu à l'école ?
Femme : Je vais à l'école à dix heures.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿A qué hora vas a la escuela?
Mujer: Voy a la escuela a las diez.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Jam berapa kamu pergi ke sekolah?
Wanita: Saya pergi ke sekolah jam sepuluh.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：何時に学校に行きますか。
女性: 私は 10 時に学校に行きます。

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wann gehst du zur Schule?
Frau: Ich gehe um zehn Uhr zur Schule.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你几点上学？
女：我十点去学校。

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：你幾點上學？
女：我十點去學校。

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: A che ora vai a scuola?
Donna: Vado a scuola alle dieci.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: В какое время ты идешь в школу?
Женщина: Я иду в школу в десять часов.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ไปโรงเรียนกี่โมง?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันไปโรงเรียนตอนสิบโมง

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: A que horas você vai para a escola?
Mulher: Vou para a escola às dez horas.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: तुम स्कूल कितने बजे जाते हो?
महिला: मैं दस बजे स्कूल जाती हूं.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Okula saat kaçta gidiyorsun?
Kadın: Saat onda okula gidiyorum.

#######

Man: What time do you go to school?
Woman: I go to school at ten o'clock.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 요즘도 수영해요? 
남자: 네. 그리고 테니스도 배우고 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo, dạo này cậu đi bơi hả? 
Nam: Ừ. Tớ cũng đang học đánh tennis nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, nagez-vous encore ces jours-ci ?
Homme : Oui. Et j'apprends aussi le tennis.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Minsu, ¿sigues nadando estos días?
Hombre: Sí. Y también estoy aprendiendo tenis.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Minsu, apakah kamu masih berenang hari ini?
Pria: Ya. Dan saya juga belajar tenis.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：みんすさん、最近も泳いでますか？
男: はい。そしてテニスも習っています。

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Minsu, schwimmst du heute noch?
Mann: Ja. Und ich lerne auch Tennis.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：珉苏，你这几天还在游泳吗？
男：是的。我也在学习网球。

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：珉蘇，你這幾天還在游泳嗎？
男：是的。我也在學習網球。

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Minsu, stai ancora nuotando in questi giorni?
Uomo: Sì. E sto imparando anche il tennis.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Минсу, ты все еще плаваешь в эти дни?
Мужчина: Да. И я тоже учусь теннису.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: มินซู ช่วงนี้คุณยังว่ายน้ำอยู่หรือเปล่า?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. และฉันก็เรียนเทนนิสด้วย

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Minsu, você ainda nada hoje em dia?
Homem: Sim. E estou aprendendo tênis também.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिंसु, क्या तुम इन दिनों भी तैर रहे हो?
आदमी: हाँ. और मैं टेनिस भी सीख रहा हूं।

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Minsu, bugünlerde hâlâ yüzüyor musun?
Adam: Evet. Ve ben de tenis öğreniyorum.

#######

Woman: Minsu, are you still swimming these days?
Man: Yes. And I'm learning tennis too.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 마리 씨 고향은 지금 겨울이에요? 
여자: 아니요. 여름이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Quê của Mari bây giờ đang là mùa đông nhỉ? 
Nữ: Không. Là mùa hè cơ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Mari, c'est l'hiver dans ta ville natale ?
Femme : Non. C'est l'été.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Mari, ¿es invierno en tu ciudad natal?
Mujer: No. Es verano.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Mari, apakah ini musim dingin di kota asalmu?
Wanita: Tidak. Ini musim panas.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: マリ、あなたの地元は冬ですか?
女性: いいえ、夏です。

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Mari, ist es Winter in deiner Heimatstadt?
Frau: Nein. Es ist Sommer.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：玛丽，你的家乡是冬天吗？
女人：不，现在是夏天。

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：瑪麗，你的家鄉是冬天嗎？
女人：不，現在是夏天。

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mari, è inverno nella tua città natale?
Donna: No. È estate.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Мари, в твоем родном городе зима?
Женщина: Нет. Сейчас лето.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: มาริ บ้านเกิดคุณหนาวหรือเปล่า?
ผู้หญิง: ไม่ค่ะ มันเป็นฤดูร้อน

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Mari, é inverno na sua cidade?
Mulher: Não. É verão.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मारी, क्या तुम्हारे गृहनगर में सर्दी है?
महिला: नहीं, गर्मी का मौसम है।

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Mari, memleketinde kış mı var?
Kadın: Hayır. Yaz geldi.

#######

Man: Mari, is it winter in your hometown?
Woman: No. It's summer.

g_text_audio_translate.en:

Man: It's behind that coffee shop.

Man: It's behind that coffee shop.

Man: It's behind that coffee shop.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I like watching movies. How about Minsu?
Man: I like exercising.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : J'aime faire de l'exercice.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 여기 일요일에 쉬어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nữ: Không. Chúng tôi đóng cửa vào thứ hai.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Are you closed on Saturdays?
Woman: No. We are closed on Mondays.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Êtes-vous fermé le samedi ?
Femme : Non. Nous sommes fermés le lundi.

Man: Are you closed on Saturdays?

g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: No. Los lunes estamos cerrados.

Woman: No. We are closed on Mondays.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Wanita: Tidak. Kami tutup pada hari Senin.

Woman: No. We are closed on Mondays.

Woman: No. We are closed on Mondays.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 계속 서울에 살았어요? 
남자: 네. 저는 서울에서 태어났어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo đã liên tục sống ở Seoul sao? 
Nam: Ừ. Tớ sinh ra ở Seoul mà.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, have you been living in Seoul continuously?
Man: Yes. I was born in Seoul.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, avez-vous vécu à Séoul en permanence ?
Homme : Oui. Je suis né à Séoul.

Man: Yes. I was born in Seoul.

Pria: Ya. Saya lahir di Seoul.

#######

Man: Yes. I was born in Seoul.

男: はい。私はソウルで生まれました。

#######

Man: Yes. I was born in Seoul.

Man: Yes. I was born in Seoul.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저는 방학 때 제주도에 갈 거예요. 수미 씨는요? 
여자: 저는 고향에 갈 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tớ sẽ đi đảo Jeju trong kỳ nghỉ này. Còn Sumi thì sao? 
Nữ: Tớ sẽ về quê.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je vais sur l'île de Jeju pour des vacances. Et toi, Sumi ?
Femme : Je vais dans ma ville natale.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Me voy a la isla de Jeju de vacaciones. ¿Qué hay de ti, Sumi?
Mujer: Voy a mi ciudad natal.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya akan pergi ke pulau Jeju untuk liburan. Bagaimana denganmu, Sumi?
Wanita: Saya akan pergi ke kampung halaman saya.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：休暇で済州島に行く予定です。スミさんは？
女：故郷に行きます。

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ich fahre in den Urlaub auf die Insel Jeju. Was ist mit dir, Sumi?
Frau: Ich gehe in meine Heimatstadt.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我要去济州岛度假。你呢，苏米？
女：我要去我的家乡。

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我要去濟州島度假。你呢，蘇米？
女：我要去我的家鄉。

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Vado in vacanza sull'isola di Jeju. E tu, Sumi?
Donna: Vado nella mia città natale.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Я собираюсь на остров Чеджу в отпуск. А что насчет тебя, Суми?
Женщина: Я еду в свой родной город.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันจะไปพักผ่อนที่เกาะเชจู แล้วคุณซูมิล่ะ?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันจะไปบ้านเกิดของฉัน

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Vou passar férias na ilha de Jeju. E você, Sumi?
Mulher: Estou indo para minha cidade natal.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैं छुट्टियों के लिए जेजू द्वीप जा रहा हूं। तुम्हारे बारे में क्या, सुमी?
महिला: मैं अपने गृहनगर जा रही हूं।

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Tatil için Jeju adasına gidiyorum. Peki ya sen Sumi?
Kadın: Memleketime gidiyorum.

#######

Man: I'm going to Jeju island for vacation. What about you, Sumi?
Woman: I'm going to my hometown.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저, 행복마트가 어디에 있어요? 
남자: 저기 은행 있지요? 은행 뒤로 가세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh ơi, siêu thị Hạnh Phúc ở đâu vậy ạ? 
Nam: Chị thấy ngân hàng đằng kia không? Chị đi ra phía sau ngân hàng nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Excusez-moi, où est le supermarché Happiness ?
Homme : Vous voyez la banque là-bas ? C'est derrière la banque.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el supermercado Felicidad?
Hombre: ¿Ves el banco de allá? Está detrás del banco.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Permisi, di mana supermarket Happiness?
Pria: Apakah Anda melihat bank di sana? Itu di belakang bank.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: すみません、ハピネス スーパーはどこですか?
男: あそこに銀行が見えますか?銀行の裏です。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Entschuldigung, wo ist der Happiness-Supermarkt?
Mann: Siehst du die Bank da drüben? Es ist hinter der Bank.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：请问，幸福超市在哪里？
男：你看到那边的银行吗？它在银行后面。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：請問，幸福超市在哪裡？
男：你看到那邊的銀行嗎？它在銀行後面。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Mi scusi, dov'è il supermercato Happiness?
Uomo: Vedi la banca laggiù? È dietro la banca.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Простите, а где супермаркет «Счастье»?
Мужчина: Вы видите там банк? Это за банком.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ขอโทษค่ะ ซูเปอร์มาร์เก็ต Happiness อยู่ที่ไหน?
ผู้ชาย: คุณเห็นธนาคารตรงนั้นไหม? มันอยู่ด้านหลังธนาคาร

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Com licença, onde fica o supermercado Felicidade?
Homem: Você vê o banco ali? Está atrás do banco.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्षमा करें, हैप्पीनेस सुपरमार्केट कहाँ है?
आदमी: क्या तुम्हें वहां बैंक दिख रहा है? यह बैंक के पीछे है.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Affedersiniz, Mutluluk süpermarketi nerede?
Adam: Oradaki bankayı görüyor musun? Bankanın arkasında.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, where is the Happiness supermarket?
Man: Do you see the bank over there? It's behind the bank.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 회사 앞에서 만날까요?
남자: 아니요, 백화점 앞에서 만납시다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chúng ta gặp nhau trước công ty nhé?
Nam: Không, gặp nhau ở trước trung tâm thương mại đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : On se retrouve devant le bureau ?
Homme : Non, retrouvons-nous devant le grand magasin.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Nos vemos frente a la oficina?
Hombre: No, nos vemos frente a los grandes almacenes.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana kalau kita bertemu di depan kantor?
Pria: Tidak, mari kita bertemu di depan department store.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：会社の前で待ち合わせしましょうか？
男：いや、デパートの前で会いましょう。

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Treffen wir uns vor dem Büro?
Mann: Nein, treffen wir uns vor dem Kaufhaus.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我们在办公室门口见面好吗？
男：不，我们在百货公司门前见面。

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我們在辦公室門口見面好嗎？
男：不，我們在百貨公司門前見面。

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Ci vediamo davanti all'ufficio?
Uomo: No, incontriamoci davanti al grande magazzino.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Давай встретимся перед офисом?
Мужчина: Нет, давай встретимся перед универмагом.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง : เรามาเจอกันที่หน้าออฟฟิศมั้ย?
ผู้ชาย : ไม่ครับ เจอกันหน้าห้างครับ

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Vamos nos encontrar na frente do escritório?
Homem: Não, vamos nos encontrar na frente da loja de departamentos.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या हम ऑफिस के सामने मिलेंगे?
आदमी: नहीं, चलो डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर के सामने मिलते हैं।

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Ofisin önünde buluşalım mı?
Adam: Hayır, mağazanın önünde buluşalım.

#######

Woman: Shall we meet in front of the office?
Man: No, let's meet in front of the department store.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 점심에 비빔밥을 먹을까요?
여자: 음 ....... 저는 불고기나 냉면을 먹고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Trưa nay ăn cơm trộn đi?
Nữ: Ừm... Tớ muốn ăn bulgogi hoặc mì lạnh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Allons-nous manger du bibimbap pour le déjeuner ?
Femme : Euh... Je veux manger du bulgogi ou des nouilles froides.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Almorzamos bibimbap?
Mujer: Um... quiero comer bulgogi o fideos fríos.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Man: Haruskah kita makan bibimbap untuk makan siang?
Wanita: Um... Saya ingin makan bulgogi atau mie dingin.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 昼食はビビンバにしましょうか?
女：うーん… プルコギか冷麺が食べたいです。

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sollen wir Bibimbap zum Mittagessen haben?
Frau: Ähm... ich möchte Bulgogi oder kalte Nudeln essen.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我们中午吃石锅拌饭好吗？
女：嗯……我想吃烤肉或者冷面。

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我們中午吃石鍋拌飯好嗎？
女：嗯……我想吃烤肉或者冷面。

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mangiamo bibimbap per pranzo?
Donna: Ehm... voglio mangiare bulgogi o noodles freddi.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Давайте на обед пибимбап?
Женщина: Хм... Я хочу съесть бульгоги или холодную лапшу.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : กินข้าวเที่ยงกันมั้ย?
ผู้หญิง: เอ่อ... ฉันอยากกินบูลโกกิหรือบะหมี่เย็นค่ะ

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Vamos almoçar bibimbap?
Mulher: Hum... eu quero comer bulgogi ou macarrão frio.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या हमें दोपहर के भोजन के लिए बिबिंबैप लेना चाहिए?
महिला: उम्म... मैं बुल्गोगी या ठंडे नूडल्स खाना चाहती हूं।

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Öğle yemeğinde bibimbap yiyelim mi?
Kadın: Hımm... Bulgogi ya da soğuk erişte yemek istiyorum.

#######

Man: Shall we have bibimbap for lunch?
Woman: Um... I want to eat bulgogi or cold noodles.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 한국 사람은 처음 만나면 어떻게 말해요?
여자: "처음 뵙겠습니다". (인사하는 것처럼) 하고 말해요.
남자: 아! 그래요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Lần đầu tiên gặp người Hàn Quốc thì tôi nên nói thế nào?
Nữ: Anh hãy nói "Rất vui khi được gặp bạn". (Giống như khi chào hỏi)
Nam: À! Vậy sao?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Comment parlez-vous aux Coréens lorsque vous les rencontrez pour la première fois ?
Femme : Dites "Ravi de vous rencontrer". (Comme une salutation)
Homme : Ah ! Est-ce vrai?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cómo hablas con los coreanos cuando los conoces por primera vez?
Mujer: Di "Encantado de conocerte". (Como un saludo)
Hombre: ¡Ay! ¿Es eso así?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Bagaimana Anda berbicara dengan orang Korea saat pertama kali bertemu dengan mereka?
Wanita: Katakan "Senang bertemu denganmu". (Seperti salam)
Pria: Oh! Apakah begitu?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：韓国人と初対面の時はどうやって話すの？
女：「はじめまして」と言ってください。 (挨拶のように)
男: あっ！そうですか？

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie redest du mit Koreanern, wenn du sie zum ersten Mal triffst?
Frau: Sagen Sie „Schön, Sie kennenzulernen“. (Wie ein Gruß)
Mann: Ach! Ist das so?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：第一次见到韩国人怎么跟他们说话？
女：说“很高兴认识你”。 （像打招呼一样）
男：哦！是这样吗？

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：第一次見到韓國人怎麼跟他們說話？
女：說“很高興認識你”。 （像打招呼一樣）
男：哦！是這樣嗎？

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Come parli con i coreani quando li incontri per la prima volta?
Donna: Di' "Piacere di conoscerti". (Come un saluto)
Uomo: Ah! È così?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Как вы разговариваете с корейцами, когда встречаетесь с ними впервые?
Женщина: Скажи: «Приятно познакомиться». (Как приветствие)
Мужчина: О! Это так?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คุณคุยกับคนเกาหลียังไงเมื่อเจอพวกเขาครั้งแรก?
ผู้หญิง: พูดว่า "ยินดีที่ได้รู้จัก" (เหมือนเป็นการทักทาย)
ผู้ชาย: โอ้! เป็นอย่างนั้นเหรอ?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Como você fala com os coreanos quando os conhece pela primeira vez?
Mulher: Diga "Prazer em conhecê-lo". (Como uma saudação)
Homem: Ah! É assim mesmo?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: जब आप कोरियाई लोगों से पहली बार मिलते हैं तो आप उनसे कैसे बात करते हैं?
महिला: कहो "आपसे मिलकर अच्छा लगा"। (अभिवादन की तरह)
आदमी: ओह! क्या ऐसा है?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Korelilerle ilk kez tanıştığınızda onlarla nasıl konuşursunuz?
Kadın: "Tanıştığımıza memnun oldum" deyin. (Bir selamlama gibi)
Adam: Ah! Böylece?

#######

Man: How do you talk to Koreans when you meet them for the first time?
Woman: Say "Nice to meet you". (Like a greeting)
Man: Oh! Is that so?

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.en:

Man: There are two rooms.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 제주도는 어땠어요?
여자: 재미있었어요. 다음에 또 가고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Đảo Jeju thế nào?
Nữ: Thú vị lắm. Lần sau tớ vẫn muốn đi tiếp.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How was Jeju Island?
Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Comment était l'île de Jeju ?
Femme : C'était amusant. Je veux y retourner la prochaine fois.

#######

Man: How was Jeju Island?
Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.

Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.

Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.

Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.

Woman: It was fun. I want to go again next time.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 토요일에 뭐 했어요?
여자: 친구하고 같이 공부를 했어요. 일요일에는 백화점에 갔어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Thứ bảy cậu đã làm gì?
Nữ: Tớ học cùng bạn. Chủ nhật tớ đến trung tâm thương mại.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What did you do on Saturday?
Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Qu'avez-vous fait samedi ?
Femme : J'ai étudié avec mon ami. Le dimanche, je suis allé au grand magasin.

Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.

Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : วันเสาร์คุณทำอะไร?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันเรียนกับเพื่อน วันอาทิตย์ฉันไปห้างสรรพสินค้า

#######

Man: What did you do on Saturday?
Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que você fez no sábado?
Mulher: Estudei com meu amigo. No domingo, fui à loja de departamentos.

#######

Man: What did you do on Saturday?
Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: तुमने शनिवार को क्या किया?
महिला: मैं अपने दोस्त के साथ पढ़ती थी. रविवार को, मैं डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर गया।

#######

Man: What did you do on Saturday?
Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Cumartesi günü ne yaptın?
Kadın: Arkadaşımla ders çalışıyorduk. Pazar günü mağazaya gittim.

#######

Man: What did you do on Saturday?
Woman: I studied with my friend. On Sunday, I went to the department store.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어디에 갔어요?
남자: 바다에 가서 구경도 하고 사진도 많이 찍었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cậu đã đi đâu vậy?
Nam: Tớ đi biển rồi tham quan và chụp hình ở đó.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Où es-tu allée ?
Homme : Je suis allé à la plage pour regarder autour de moi et j'ai pris beaucoup de photos.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Adónde fuiste?
Hombre: Fui a la playa a mirar alrededor y tomé muchas fotos.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kemana kamu pergi?
Pria: Saya pergi ke pantai untuk melihat-lihat dan mengambil banyak gambar.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：どこに行ったの？
男性：ビーチに行って見回して、たくさん写真を撮りました。

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wo bist du hingegangen?
Mann: Ich bin zum Strand gegangen, um mich umzusehen, und habe viele Fotos gemacht.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你去哪儿了？
男：我去海边看看，拍了很多照片。

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你去哪兒了？
男：我去海邊看看，拍了很多照片。

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Dove sei andato?
Uomo: Sono andato in spiaggia a guardarmi intorno e ho fatto molte foto.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Куда ты пошел?
Мужчина: Я пошел на пляж осмотреться и сделал много фотографий.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณไปไหนมา?
ผู้ชาย: ผมไปชายหาดเพื่อเดินชมรอบๆ และถ่ายรูปไว้เยอะมาก

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Aonde você foi?
Homem: Fui à praia dar uma olhada e tirei muitas fotos.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: कहां गए थे?
आदमी: मैं चारों ओर देखने के लिए समुद्र तट पर गया और बहुत सारी तस्वीरें लीं।

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Nereye gittin?
Adam: Etrafa bakmak için sahile gittim ve bir sürü fotoğraf çektim.

#######

Woman: Where did you go?
Man: I went to the beach to look around and took a lot of pictures.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 내일이 수미 씨 생일이지요? 뭘 살까요?
여자: 꽃하고 카드가 어때요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ngày mai là sinh nhật Sumi phải không? Nên mua gì đây nhỉ?
Nữ: Hoa và thiệp thì thế nào?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Demain, c'est l'anniversaire de Sumi, n'est-ce pas ? Que dois-je acheter ?
Femme : Que diriez-vous de fleurs et de cartes ?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Mañana es el cumpleaños de Sumi, ¿verdad? ¿Qué debo comprar?
Mujer: ¿Qué tal flores y tarjetas?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Besok adalah hari ulang tahun Sumi, kan? Apa yang harus saya beli?
Wanita: Bagaimana dengan bunga dan kartu?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 明日は澄美の誕生日ですよね?何を買おうかな？
女：お花やカードはいかがですか？

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Morgen ist Sumis Geburtstag, richtig? Was soll ich kaufen?
Frau: Wie wäre es mit Blumen und Karten?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：明天是Sumi的生日，对吧？我要买什么？
女人：鲜花和卡片怎么样？

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?

女人：鮮花和卡片怎麼樣？

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Che ne dici di fiori e biglietti?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?

Мужчина: Завтра у Суми день рождения, да? Что мне купить?
Женщина: Как насчет цветов и открыток?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: พรุ่งนี้เป็นวันเกิดของซูมิใช่ไหม? ฉันจะซื้ออะไรดี?
ผู้หญิง: แล้วดอกไม้กับการ์ดล่ะ?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Amanhã é aniversário da Sumi, certo? O que devo comprar?
Mulher: Que tal flores e cartões?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: कल सुमी का जन्मदिन है ना? मैं क्या खरीदूं?
महिला: फूल और कार्ड के बारे में क्या ख्याल है?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Yarın Sumi'nin doğum günü değil mi? Ne satın alacağım?
Kadın: Peki çiçeklere ve kartlara ne dersiniz?

#######

Man: Tomorrow is Sumi's birthday, right? What shall I buy?
Woman: How about flowers and cards?

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저기에 살아요?
여자: 네. 저기 2층에 살아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chị sống ở kia sao?
Nữ: Vâng. Tôi sống ở tầng 2.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Vous habitez là-bas ?
Femme : Oui. J'habite au 2ème étage.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Vives allí?
Mujer: Sí. Vivo en el segundo piso.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah Anda tinggal di sana?
Wanita: Ya. Saya tinggal di lantai 2.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：そこに住んでいますか。
女性: はい。私は2階に住んでいます。

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wohnen Sie dort?
Frau: Ja. Ich wohne im 2. Stock.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你住那里吗？
女：是的。我住在二楼。

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：你住那裡嗎？
女：是的。我住在二樓。

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Abiti lì?
Donna: Sì. Vivo al 2° piano.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Ты там живешь?
Женщина: Да. Я живу на 2 этаже.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คุณอาศัยอยู่ที่นั่นไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. ฉันอาศัยอยู่ชั้น 2

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Você mora aí?
Mulher: Sim. Moro no 2º andar.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या तुम वहाँ रहते हो?
महिला: हाँ. मैं दूसरी मंजिल पर रहता हूँ.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Orada mı yaşıyorsun?
Kadın: Evet. 2. katta oturuyorum.

#######

Man: Do you live there?
Woman: Yes. I live on the 2nd floor.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 동생이 있어요?
남자: 네, 여동생이 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh có em không?
Nam: Có, tôi có em gái.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous des frères et sœurs plus jeunes ?
Homme : Oui, j'ai une sœur cadette.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Tienes hermanos menores?
Hombre: Sí, tengo una hermana menor.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda memiliki adik perempuan?
Pria: Ya, saya punya adik perempuan.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：年下の兄弟はいますか。
男：はい、妹がいます。

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Haben Sie jüngere Geschwister?
Mann: Ja, ich habe eine jüngere Schwester.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你有弟弟妹妹吗？
男：是的，我有一个妹妹。

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你有弟弟妹妹嗎？
男：是的，我有一個妹妹。

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Hai fratelli più piccoli?
Uomo: Sì, ho una sorella minore.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Есть ли у вас младшие братья и сестры?
Мужчина: Да, у меня есть младшая сестра.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณมีน้องชายไหม?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ ฉันมีน้องสาว

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Você tem irmãos mais novos?
Homem: Sim, tenho uma irmã mais nova.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या आपके कोई छोटे भाई-बहन हैं?
आदमी: हाँ, मेरी एक छोटी बहन है.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Küçük kardeşin var mı?
Adam: Evet, küçük bir kız kardeşim var.

#######

Woman: Do you have any younger siblings? 
Man: Yes, I have a younger sister.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:

여자: 작년 여름에 찍었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Woman: It was taken last summer.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Elle a été prise l'été dernier.

Woman: It was taken last summer.

Wanita: Itu diambil musim panas lalu.

Woman: It was taken last summer.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:

Woman: I like sports very much. So I exercise with my friends.

Femme : J'aime beaucoup le sport. Alors je fais du sport avec mes amis.

여자: 열 시에 왔어요.

Nữ: Tôi tới lúc mười giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What time did you come?
Woman: I came at ten.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À quelle heure es-tu venu ?
Femme : Je suis venue à dix heures.

#######

Man: What time did you come?
Woman: I came at ten.

Mujer: Llegué a las diez.

Woman: I came at ten.

Wanita: Saya datang jam sepuluh.

Woman: I came at ten.

女性: 10 時に来ました。

Woman: I came at ten.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 주말에 보통 뭐 해요?
남자: 저는 산을 좋아해요. 그래서 친구와 자주 등산을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cuối tuần anh thường làm gì?
Nam: Tôi thích núi. Vì vậy tôi thường đi leo núi với bạn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Que faites-vous habituellement le week-end ?
Homme : J'aime les montagnes. Donc, je fais souvent de la randonnée avec mes amis.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Qué sueles hacer los fines de semana?
Hombre: Me gustan las montañas. Entonces, a menudo voy de excursión con mis amigos.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apa yang biasanya kamu lakukan di akhir pekan?
Pria: Saya suka gunung. Jadi, saya sering pergi hiking dengan teman-teman saya.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女: 週末はいつも何をしますか?
男：山が好きです。だから、よく友達とハイキングに行きます。

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Was machst du normalerweise am Wochenende?
Mann: Ich mag Berge. Also gehe ich oft mit meinen Freunden wandern.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你周末通常做什么？
男：我喜欢山。所以，我经常和朋友一起去远足。

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你周末通常做什麼？
男：我喜歡山。所以，我經常和朋友一起去遠足。

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Cosa fai di solito nel fine settimana?
Uomo: Mi piacciono le montagne. Quindi, vado spesso a fare escursioni con i miei amici.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Что ты обычно делаешь на выходных?
Мужчина: Мне нравятся горы. Поэтому я часто хожу в походы с друзьями.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ปกติคุณทำอะไรในช่วงสุดสัปดาห์?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันชอบภูเขา ฉันจึงไปเดินป่ากับเพื่อนบ่อยๆ

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: O que você costuma fazer no fim de semana?
Homem: Eu gosto de montanhas. Então, costumo fazer caminhadas com meus amigos.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: आप आमतौर पर सप्ताहांत में क्या करते हैं?
आदमी: मुझे पहाड़ पसंद हैं. इसलिए, मैं अक्सर अपने दोस्तों के साथ लंबी पैदल यात्रा पर जाता हूं।

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Hafta sonları genellikle ne yaparsınız?
Adam: Dağları severim. Bu yüzden sık sık arkadaşlarımla yürüyüşe çıkıyorum.

#######

Woman: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Man: I like mountains. So, I often go hiking with my friends.

여자: 테니스 잘 쳐요?
남자: 아니요, 탁구는 잘 치지만 테니스는 잘 못 쳐요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh đánh tennis giỏi không?
Nam: Không, tôi chơi bóng bàn giỏi nhưng không chơi được tennis.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Are you good at tennis?
Man: No, I can play table tennis well, but I'm not good at tennis.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Êtes-vous bon au tennis ?
Homme : Non, je peux bien jouer au tennis de table, mais je ne suis pas bon au tennis.

#######

Woman: Are you good at tennis?
Man: No, I can play table tennis well, but I'm not good at tennis.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Eres bueno en el tenis?
Hombre: No, puedo jugar bien al tenis de mesa, pero no soy bueno en el tenis.

#######

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨는 초등학교 때 뭐가 되고 싶었어요?
여자: 가수가 되고 싶었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Khi học tiểu học Sumi muốn trở thành người nào?
Nữ: Tớ muốn trở thành ca sĩ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, que voulais-tu faire quand tu étais à l'école primaire ?
Femme : Je voulais être chanteuse.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sumi, ¿qué querías ser cuando estabas en la escuela primaria?
Mujer: Quería ser cantante.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Sumi, apa yang Anda inginkan ketika Anda masih di sekolah dasar?
Wanita: Saya ingin menjadi penyanyi.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：スミ、小学生の頃何になりたかった？
女：歌手になりたかったんです。

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sumi, was wolltest du werden, als du in der Grundschule warst?
Frau: Ich wollte Sängerin werden.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：Sumi，你上小学的时候想做什么？
女：我想成为一名歌手。

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：Sumi，你上小學的時候想做什麼？
女：我想成為一名歌手。

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sumi, cosa volevi fare quando eri alle elementari?
Donna: Volevo diventare una cantante.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Суми, кем ты хотела стать, когда училась в начальной школе?
Женщина: Я хотела быть певицей.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ซูมิ ตอนเรียนประถมคุณอยากเป็นอะไร?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันอยากเป็นนักร้อง

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Sumi, o que você queria ser quando estava no ensino fundamental?
Mulher: Eu queria ser cantora.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सुमी, जब तुम प्राथमिक विद्यालय में थी तो तुम क्या बनना चाहती थी?
महिला: मैं गायिका बनना चाहती थी।

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sumi, ilkokuldayken ne olmak istiyordun?
Kadın: Şarkıcı olmak istiyordum.

#######

Man: Sumi, what did you want to be when you were in elementary school?
Woman: I wanted to be a singer.
