title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 한국은 내일 쉬는 날이에요?
남자: 네. 어린이날이라서 쉬어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Mai là ngày nghỉ ở Hàn Quốc sao?
Nam: Ừ. Mai là ngày thiếu nhi nên được nghỉ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Les Coréens ont-ils un jour de congé demain ?
Homme : Oui. Demain, c'est la fête des enfants, nous avons donc tous un jour de congé.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Los coreanos tienen día libre mañana?
Hombre: Sí. Mañana es el día del niño, así que todos tenemos un día libre.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah orang Korea memiliki hari libur besok?
Pria: Ya. Besok adalah hari Anak, jadi kita semua punya hari libur.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女: 韓国人は明日休みですか?
男: はい。明日はこどもの日なので、みんなお休みです。

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Haben die Koreaner morgen frei?
Mann: Ja. Morgen ist Kindertag, also haben wir alle frei.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：韩国人明天放假吗？
男：是的。明天是儿童节，所以我们都放假了。

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：韓國人明天放假嗎？
男：是的。明天是兒童節，所以我們都放假了。

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: I coreani hanno un giorno libero domani?
Uomo: Sì. Domani è la festa dei bambini, quindi abbiamo tutti un giorno libero.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: У корейцев завтра выходной?
Мужчина: Да. Завтра День защиты детей, поэтому у всех нас выходной.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: พรุ่งนี้คนเกาหลีมีวันหยุดไหม?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. พรุ่งนี้เป็นวันเด็ก เราทุกคนจึงมีวันหยุด

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Os coreanos têm folga amanhã?
Homem: Sim. Amanhã é dia das crianças, então todos temos um dia de folga.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या कोरियाई लोगों की कल छुट्टी है?
आदमी: हाँ. कल बाल दिवस है इसलिए हम सभी को एक दिन की छुट्टी है.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Korelilerin yarın izin günü var mı?
Adam: Evet. Yarın Çocuk Bayramı, dolayısıyla hepimizin bir izin günü var.

#######

Woman: Do Koreans have a day off tomorrow?
Man: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's day, so we all have a day off.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 토요일하고 일요일은 뭐해요?
여자: 보통 집에서 쉬어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Thứ 7 và chủ nhật bạn làm gì?
Nữ: Tôi thường nghỉ ngơi ở nhà.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que faites-vous le samedi et le dimanche ?
Femme : Je me repose généralement à la maison.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué haces los sábados y domingos?
Mujer: Suelo descansar en casa.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang Anda lakukan pada hari Sabtu dan Minggu?
Wanita: Saya biasanya istirahat di rumah.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：土日は何をしますか。
女：普段は家で休んでいます。

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was machst du samstags und sonntags?
Frau: Normalerweise ruhe ich zu Hause.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：周六周日你做什么？
女：我平时在家休息。

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：週六週日你做什麼？
女：我平時在家休息。

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa fai il sabato e la domenica?
Donna: Di solito mi riposo a casa.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что ты делаешь по субботам и воскресеньям?
Женщина: Обычно я отдыхаю дома.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คุณทำอะไรในวันเสาร์และอาทิตย์?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันมักจะพักผ่อนที่บ้าน

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que você faz aos sábados e domingos?
Mulher: Geralmente descanso em casa.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: तुम शनिवार और रविवार को क्या करते हो?
महिला: मैं आमतौर पर घर पर आराम करती हूं।

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Cumartesi ve pazar günleri ne yaparsınız?
Kadın: Genelde evde dinlenirim.

#######

Man: What do you do on Saturdays and Sundays?
Woman: I usually rest at home.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어제 산 구두 신어 봤어요?
남자: 네. 그런데 발이 좀 아파요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh đã mang thử đôi giày mới mua hôm qua chưa?
Nam: Rồi. Nhưng hơi bị đau chân.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous essayé les chaussures que vous avez achetées hier ?
Homme : Oui. Mais ils me font un peu mal aux pieds.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Te has probado los zapatos que compraste ayer?
Hombre: Sí. Pero hacen que me duelan un poco los pies.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Sudahkah Anda mencoba sepatu yang Anda beli kemarin?
Pria: Ya. Tapi mereka membuat kakiku sedikit sakit.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：昨日買った靴は試着しましたか？
男: はい。しかし、彼らは私の足を少し傷つけます。

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Hast du die Schuhe anprobiert, die du gestern gekauft hast?
Mann: Ja. Aber sie machen meine Füße ein bisschen weh.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：昨天买的鞋子试穿了吗？
男：是的。但它们让我的脚有点痛。

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：昨天買的鞋子試穿了嗎？
男：是的。但它們讓我的腳有點痛。

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Hai provato le scarpe che hai comprato ieri?
Uomo: Sì. Ma mi fanno un po' male i piedi.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Ты примерил туфли, которые купил вчера?
Мужчина: Да. Но от них у меня немного болят ноги.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณเคยลองรองเท้าที่คุณซื้อเมื่อวานหรือยัง?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. แต่มันทำให้เท้าของฉันเจ็บนิดหน่อย

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Você já experimentou os sapatos que comprou ontem?
Homem: Sim. Mas eles fazem meus pés doerem um pouco.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या आपने कल खरीदे गए जूतों को आज़माया है?
आदमी: हाँ. लेकिन इनसे मेरे पैरों में थोड़ी तकलीफ़ हो जाती है।

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Dün aldığın ayakkabıyı denedin mi?
Adam: Evet. Ama ayaklarımı biraz acıtıyorlar.

#######

Woman: Have you tried on the shoes you bought yesterday?
Man: Yes. But they make my feet hurt a bit.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 실례지만, 올해 몇 살이에요?
남자: 스물일곱 살이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Xin lỗi (vì đã hỏi), năm nay bạn bao nhiêu tuổi?
Nam: Tôi 27 tuổi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Excusez-moi, quel âge avez-vous cette année ?
Homme : J'ai 27 ans.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Disculpe, ¿cuántos años tiene este año?
Hombre: Tengo 27.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Permisi, berapa umurmu tahun ini?
Pria: Saya 27.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：すみません、今年は何歳ですか？
男: 私は 27 歳です。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Entschuldigung, wie alt bist du dieses Jahr?
Mann: Ich bin 27.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：请问，你今年几岁？
男：我27岁。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：請問，你今年幾歲？
男：我27歲。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Mi scusi, quanti anni ha quest'anno?
Uomo: ho 27 anni.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Извините, сколько вам лет в этом году?
Мужчина: Мне 27.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ขอโทษค่ะ ปีนี้คุณอายุเท่าไหร่คะ?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันอายุ 27.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Com licença, quantos anos você tem este ano?
Homem: Tenho 27 anos.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: माफ कीजिए, इस साल आपकी उम्र कितनी है?
आदमी: मैं 27 साल का हूं.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Affedersiniz, bu yıl kaç yaşındasınız?
Adam: 27 yaşındayım.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, how old are you this year?
Man: I'm 27.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 비가 아직도 와요?
여자: 네. 춥고 바람도 많이 불어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bây giờ vẫn mưa à?
Nữ: Ừ. Vừa lạnh vừa gió to nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Is it still raining?
Woman: Yes. It's cold and windy.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이건 누가 찍었어요?
남자: 제 친구가 찍었어요. 잘 나왔지요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Bạn tôi chụp đó. Đẹp không?

Woman: Who took this photo?
Man: My friend took it. It came out well, right?

Femme : Qui a pris cette photo ?
Homme : Mon ami l'a pris. C'est bien sorti, non ?

#######

Woman: Who took this photo?
Man: My friend took it. It came out well, right?
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Mi amigo lo tomó. Salió bien, ¿verdad?

#######

Woman: Who took this photo?
Man: My friend took it. It came out well, right?

Pria: Teman saya mengambilnya. Itu keluar dengan baik, kan?

Woman: Who took this photo?

g_text_audio_translate.ja:

Woman: Who took this photo?

Mann: Mein Freund hat es genommen. Es kam gut heraus, oder?

Man: My friend took it. It came out well, right?

Uomo: L'ha preso il mio amico. È venuto bene, vero?

Мужчина: Мой друг взял это. Вышло хорошо, да?

Homem: Meu amigo pegou. Saiu bem, certo?

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우리 오늘 저녁에 만나는 거 맞지요?
남자: 어? 그거 내일 아니었어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tối nay chúng ta gặp nhau nhỉ?
Nam: Hả? Không phải là ngày mai à?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Nous nous rencontrons ce soir, n'est-ce pas ?
Homme : Quoi ? N'est-ce pas demain ?

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Nos reunimos esta noche, ¿verdad?
Hombre: ¿Qué? ¿No es mañana?

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kami bertemu malam ini, kan?
Pria: Apa? Bukannya besok?

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：今夜会うんだよね？
男: なに？明日じゃないの？

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Treffen wir uns heute Abend, richtig?
Mann: Was? Ist es nicht morgen?

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女人：我们今晚要见面，对吧？
男：什么？不是明天吗？

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女人：我們今晚要見面，對吧？
男：什麼？不是明天嗎？

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Ci incontriamo stasera, giusto?
Uomo: Cosa? Non è domani?

#######

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Мы встречаемся сегодня вечером, верно?
Мужчина: Что? Разве это не завтра?

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คืนนี้เรามีนัดกันใช่ไหม?
ผู้ชาย: อะไร? พรุ่งนี้ไม่ใช่เหรอ?

Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?

Homem: O quê? Não é amanhã?

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: हम आज रात मिल रहे हैं, है ना?
आदमी: क्या? क्या यह कल नहीं है?

Woman: We're meeting tonight, right?
Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bu akşam buluşuyoruz değil mi?
Adam: Ne? Yarın değil mi?

Man: What? Isn't it tomorrow?

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 제주도에서 재미있었어요?
남자: 네, 날씨도 좋고 정말 재미있었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Đảo Jeju có thú vị không?
Nam: Có, thời tiết cũng đẹp và cũng rất vui.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Vous êtes-vous amusé sur l'île de Jeju ?
Homme : Oui, il faisait beau et c'était vraiment amusant.

#######

Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Te divertiste en la isla de Jeju?
Hombre: Sí, el clima estuvo agradable y fue muy divertido.

#######

Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda bersenang-senang di Pulau Jeju?
Pria: Ya, cuacanya bagus dan sangat menyenangkan.

#######

Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

男性：はい、天気が良くて本当に楽しかったです。

#######

Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Ja, das Wetter war schön und es hat richtig Spaß gemacht.

#######

Woman: Did you have fun on Jeju Island?
Man: Yes, the weather was nice and it was really fun.

男：是的，天气很好，真的很有趣。

남자: 십일월 구일에 올 거예요.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 제인 씨, 불고기 먹어 봤어요?
여자: 네,먹어 봤어요.정말 맛있었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Jane, cậu ăn thử món bò bulgogi chưa?
Nữ: Rồi, tớ ăn rồi. Ngon lắm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Jane, avez-vous essayé le bulgogi ?
Femme : Oui, j'ai essayé. C'est vraiment délicieux.

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Jane, ¿has probado el bulgogi?
Mujer: Sí, lo probé. Es realmente delicioso.

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Jane, apakah kamu sudah mencoba bulgogi?
Wanita: Ya, saya mencobanya. Ini benar-benar lezat.

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: ジェーン、プルコギ食べたことある？
女：はい、やってみました。本当に美味しいです。

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Jane, hast du Bulgogi probiert?
Frau: Ja, ich habe es versucht. Es ist wirklich köstlich.

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：简，你吃过烤肉吗？
女：是的，我试过了。真的很好吃。

#######

Man: Jane, have you tried bulgogi?
Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：簡，你吃過烤肉嗎？
女：是的，我試過了。真的很好吃。

#######

Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Jane, hai provato il bulgogi?
Donna: Sì, l'ho provato. È davvero delizioso.

#######

Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Женщина: Да, я пробовала. Это действительно вкусно.

#######

Woman: Yes, I tried it. It's really delicious.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저는 운동하는 것을 좋아해요.
남자: 저는 시간이 있을 때 사진을 찍어요.

Nam: Khi có thời gian rảnh thì tôi chụp ảnh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I like exercising.
Man: When I have free time, I take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Quand j'ai du temps libre, je prends des photos.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 사람이 동생이에요?
남자: 아니요, 형이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Người này là em cậu sao?
Nam: Không, là anh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Cette personne est-elle votre jeune frère ?
Homme : Non. C'est mon frère aîné.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Esta persona es tu hermano menor?
Hombre: No. Es mi hermano mayor.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah orang ini adikmu?
Pria: Tidak. Dia kakak laki-laki saya.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：この人はあなたの弟ですか。
男: いいえ。彼は私の兄です。

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Ist diese Person Ihr jüngerer Bruder?
Mann: Nein. Er ist mein älterer Bruder.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：这个人是你弟弟吗？
男：不，他是我的哥哥。

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：這個人是你弟弟嗎？
男：不，他是我的哥哥。

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Questa persona è tuo fratello minore?
Uomo: No. È mio fratello maggiore.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Этот человек — твой младший брат?
Мужчина: Нет. Он мой старший брат.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คนนี้คือน้องชายของคุณหรือเปล่า?
ผู้ชาย: ไม่ใช่ครับ เขาเป็นพี่ชายของผม

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Essa pessoa é seu irmão mais novo?
Homem: Não. Ele é meu irmão mais velho.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या यह आपका छोटा भाई है?
आदमी: नहीं. वह मेरा बड़ा भाई है.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bu kişi senin küçük kardeşin mi?
Adam: Hayır. O benim ağabeyim.

#######

Woman: Is this person your younger brother?
Man: No. He's my older brother.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 영수 씨는 수영을 잘해요?
여자: 네, 잘해요. 테니스도 잘 쳐요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Young Soo bơi có giỏi không?
Nữ: Có, tôi bơi giỏi. Tôi cũng giỏi tennis nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Êtes-vous doué pour la natation, Youngsu ?
Femme : Oui, je suis douée pour ça. Je joue aussi bien au tennis.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Eres bueno nadando, Youngsu?
Mujer: Sí, soy buena en eso. También juego bien al tenis.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah kamu pandai berenang, Youngsu?
Wanita: Ya, saya baik dalam hal itu. Saya juga bermain tenis dengan baik.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：泳ぐのは得意ですか、ヨンス？
女：はい、得意です。テニスもよくします。

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?

g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

女：是的，我很擅长。我的网球也打得很好。

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.

女：是的，我很擅長。我的網球也打得很好。

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Sì, sono brava. Gioco bene anche a tennis.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Женщина: Да, у меня это хорошо получается. Я также хорошо играю в теннис.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Você nada bem, Youngsu?
Mulher: Sim, sou boa nisso. Eu também jogo bem tênis.

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

#######

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.

Kadın: Evet, bu işte iyiyim. Ayrıca iyi tenis oynarım.

Man: Are you good at swimming, Youngsu?
Woman: Yes, I'm good at it. I also play tennis well.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 친구가 졸업하는데 뭘 사 주면 좋을까요?
여자: 구두 어때요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn tôi tốt nghiệp, nên mua gì bây giờ nhỉ?
Nữ: Mua giày thì sao?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que dois-je acheter à mon ami pour l'obtention de son diplôme ?
Femme : Et les chaussures ?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué debo comprarle a mi amigo para la graduación?
Mujer: ¿Qué hay de los zapatos?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang harus saya beli teman saya untuk wisuda?
Wanita: Bagaimana dengan sepatu?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 友達の卒業式に何を買えばいいですか?
女：靴は？

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was soll ich meinem Freund zum Abschluss kaufen?
Frau: Wie wäre es mit Schuhen?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我朋友毕业买什么？
女：鞋呢？

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我朋友畢業買什麼？
女：鞋呢？

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa dovrei comprare al mio amico per la laurea?
Donna: E le scarpe?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что мне купить другу на выпускной?
Женщина: Как насчет обуви?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ซื้ออะไรให้เพื่อนรับปริญญาดี?
ผู้หญิง: แล้วรองเท้าล่ะ?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que devo comprar para meu amigo na formatura?
Mulher: Que tal sapatos?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मुझे अपने दोस्त को ग्रेजुएशन के लिए क्या खरीदना चाहिए?
महिला: जूते के बारे में क्या ख्याल है?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Mezuniyet için arkadaşıma ne almalıyım?
Kadın: Peki ya ayakkabılar?

#######

Man: What should I buy my friend for graduation?
Woman: How about shoes?

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 무슨 일을 하세요?
남자: 저는 회사원이에요.

Nam: Tớ là nhân viên văn phòng.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Je suis employé de bureau.

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.

Hombre: Soy oficinista.

Man: I'm an office worker.

Pria: Saya seorang pekerja kantoran.

#######

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：ミンスは何をしているの？
男：会社員です。

#######

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Ich bin ein Büroangestellter.

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

Man: I'm an office worker.

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.

Uomo: Sono un impiegato.

#######

Woman: What does Minsu do?
Man: I'm an office worker.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Man: I'm an office worker.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저는 주말에 보통 수영을 해요. 민수 씨는요?
남자: 저는 시간을 있을 때 등산을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi thường bơi vào cuối tuần. Anh thì sao, Minsu?
Nam: Tôi đi bộ đường dài khi tôi có thời gian.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Di solito vado a nuotare nei fine settimana. E tu, Minsu?
Uomo: Quando ho tempo, vado a fare escursioni.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je vais habituellement nager le week-end. Et toi Minsu ?
Homme : Quand j'ai le temps, je fais de la randonnée.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Normalmente voy a nadar los fines de semana. ¿Y tú, Minsu?
Hombre: Cuando tengo tiempo, voy de excursión.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Saya biasanya pergi berenang di akhir pekan. Bagaimana denganmu, Minsu?
Pria: Jika ada waktu, saya pergi mendaki.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 私は週末によく泳ぎに行きます。ミンスさんはどうですか？
男性: 時間があればハイキングに行きます。

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Normalerweise gehe ich am Wochenende schwimmen. Was ist mit dir, Minsu?
Mann: Wenn ich Zeit habe, gehe ich wandern.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我周末通常去游泳。敏苏，你呢？
男：一有时间，我就去爬山。

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我周末通常去游泳。敏蘇，你呢？
男：一有時間，我就去爬山。

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Мужчина: Когда у меня есть время, я хожу в поход.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันมักจะไปว่ายน้ำในช่วงสุดสัปดาห์ แล้วคุณมินซูล่ะ?
ผู้ชาย : พอมีเวลาก็ไปเดินป่า

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Costumo nadar nos finais de semana. E você, Minsu?
Homem: Quando tenho tempo, faço caminhadas.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.

महिला: मैं आमतौर पर सप्ताहांत पर तैराकी करने जाती हूं। तुम्हारे बारे में क्या, मिंसु?
आदमी: जब मेरे पास समय होता है तो मैं लंबी पैदल यात्रा पर जाता हूं।

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Genellikle hafta sonları yüzmeye giderim. Peki ya sen Minsu?
Adam: Zamanım olduğunda yürüyüşe çıkarım.

#######

Woman: I usually go swimming on the weekends. What about you, Minsu?
Man: When I have time, I go hiking.

Woman: No. I'm going to the department store next week to buy it.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여름은 덥지만 저는 여름을 좋아해요.
남자: 저도요. 여름에는 해수욕을 할 수 있어서 너무 좋아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Mùa hè nóng nực, nhưng tôi thích mùa hè.
Nam: Tôi cũng vậy. Mùa hè được tắm biển nên thật tuyệt.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Summer is hot, but I like summer.
Man: Me too. It's so nice to be able to bathe in the sea in summer.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: L'estate è calda, ma mi piace l'estate.
Uomo: Anche a me. È così bello poter fare il bagno nel mare d'estate.

#######

Woman: Summer is hot, but I like summer.
Man: Me too. It's so nice to be able to bathe in the sea in summer.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Moi aussi. C'est tellement agréable de pouvoir se baigner dans la mer en été.

#######

Woman: Summer is hot, but I like summer.
Man: Me too. It's so nice to be able to bathe in the sea in summer.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Yo también. Qué bonito poder bañarse en el mar en verano.

Man: Me too. It's so nice to be able to bathe in the sea in summer.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이걸 직접 그렸어요? 정말 예뻐요.
여자: 고마워요. 어릴 때부터 꽃 그리는 것을 좋아했어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cô đã tự vẽ cái này sao? Nó thực sự đẹp.
Nữ: Cảm ơn anh. Tôi đã thích vẽ hoa từ khi tôi còn nhỏ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Did you draw this yourself? It's really pretty.
Woman: Thank you. I have loved drawing flowers since I was little.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: L'hai disegnato tu stesso? È davvero carino.
Donna: Grazie. Fin da piccola amo disegnare fiori.

#######

Man: Did you draw this yourself? It's really pretty.
Woman: Thank you. I have loved drawing flowers since I was little.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : As-tu dessiné ça toi-même ? C'est vraiment joli.
Femme : Merci. J'adore dessiner des fleurs depuis que je suis petite.

#######

Man: Did you draw this yourself? It's really pretty.
Woman: Thank you. I have loved drawing flowers since I was little.

Mujer: Gracias. Me encanta dibujar flores desde pequeña.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 내일 학교에 안 와요?
여자: 네. 내일은 어린이날이어서 쉬어요. 수업이 없어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ngày mai cô không đến trường à?
Nữ: Vâng. Ngày mai là ngày thiếu nhi nên tôi được nghỉ một ngày. Không có lớp học nào cả.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Aren't you coming to school tomorrow?
Woman: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's Day, so I'm off. There are no classes.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Domani non vieni a scuola?
Donna: Sì. Domani è la festa dei bambini, quindi me ne vado. Non ci sono lezioni.

#######

Man: Aren't you coming to school tomorrow?
Woman: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's Day, so I'm off. There are no classes.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Oui. Demain c'est la fête des enfants, donc je pars. Il n'y a pas de cours.

#######

Man: Aren't you coming to school tomorrow?
Woman: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's Day, so I'm off. There are no classes.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: Sí. Mañana es el Día del Niño, así que me voy. No hay clases.

Woman: Yes. Tomorrow is Children's Day, so I'm off. There are no classes.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 오늘 보내면 언제 받을 수 있어요?
여자: 모레 중으로 받으실 수 있으십니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Nếu tôi gửi nó hôm nay, khi nào người nhận có thể nhận được nó?
Nữ: Người nhận sẽ nhận được nó vào ngày mốt.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Nam: If I send it today, when can the recipient receive it?
Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Nam: Se lo invio oggi, quando potrà riceverlo il destinatario?
Donna: Il destinatario lo riceverà dopodomani.

#######

Nam: If I send it today, when can the recipient receive it?
Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Nam : Si je l'envoie aujourd'hui, quand le destinataire pourra-t-il le recevoir ?
Femme : Le destinataire le recevra après-demain.

#######

Nam: If I send it today, when can the recipient receive it?
Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: El destinatario lo recibirá pasado mañana.

Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.

女性: 受取人は明後日に受け取ります。

Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.

Woman: The recipient will receive it the day after tomorrow.

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.en:

Woman: I love watching movies. So I go to the movie theater often.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 방학 기간 동안에 무엇을 할 거예요?
남자: 한국에 유명한 관광지를 여행할 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bạn định làm gì trong kỳ nghỉ?
Nam: Tôi sẽ đi du lịch đến các địa điểm du lịch nổi tiếng ở Hàn Quốc.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Cosa farai durante le vacanze?
Uomo: Viaggerò in famose località turistiche in Corea.

#######

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Que vas-tu faire pendant les vacances ?
Homme : Je vais voyager dans des lieux touristiques célèbres en Corée.

#######

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Voy a viajar a lugares turísticos famosos de Corea.

#######

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?

Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.

#######

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.

#######

Woman: What are you going to do during vacation?
Man: I am going to travel to famous tourist spots in Korea.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 모레는 크리스마스라서 수업이 없습니다.
남자: 와. 네. 알겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 주말에 같이 등산 갈까요?
여자: 좋아요. 봄이라 꽃이 많이 피어서 정말 예쁠 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chúng ta cùng đi leo núi vào cuối tuần chứ?
Nữ: Được đó. Đang là mùa xuân, rất nhiều hoa sẽ nở nên sẽ rất đẹp cho xem.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Andiamo a fare un'escursione insieme nel fine settimana?
Donna: Va bene. Dato che è primavera, sbocceranno molti fiori e sarà davvero carino.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : On va faire de la randonnée ensemble le week-end ?
Femme : D’accord. Comme c'est le printemps, de nombreuses fleurs fleuriront et ce sera vraiment joli.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Vamos a caminar juntos el fin de semana?
Mujer: Está bien. Como es primavera, florecerán muchas flores y quedará realmente bonito.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Bagaimana kalau kita pergi hiking bersama di akhir pekan?
Wanita: Oke. Karena ini musim semi, banyak bunga akan bermekaran dan sungguh indah.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 週末に一緒にハイキングに行きませんか?
女性: わかりました。春なのでたくさんの花が咲いてとてもきれいです。

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Gehen wir am Wochenende zusammen wandern?
Frau: Okay. Da es Frühling ist, werden viele Blumen blühen und es wird wirklich hübsch sein.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：周末我们一起去爬山吗？
女：好的。因为是春天，很多花都开了，非常漂亮。

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：週末我們一起去爬山嗎？
女：好的。因為是春天，很多花都開了，非常漂亮。

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Пойдем вместе в поход на выходных?
Женщина: Хорошо. Поскольку сейчас весна, расцветет много цветов, и это будет очень красиво.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: สุดสัปดาห์เราไปเดินป่าด้วยกันไหม?
ผู้หญิง: เอาล่ะ เนื่องจากเป็นฤดูใบไม้ผลิ ดอกไม้จำนวนมากจะบานสะพรั่งและจะสวยงามมาก

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?
Woman: Okay. Since it is spring, many flowers will bloom and it will be really pretty.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Mulher: Ok. Como é primavera, muitas flores vão desabrochar e vai ficar muito lindo.

#######

Man: Shall we go hiking together on the weekend?

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 다음 주가 생일이네요. 무엇을 받고 싶어요?
여자: 저는 지갑을 받고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nữ: Tớ muốn một chiếc ví.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: It's your birthday next week. What would you like to receive?
Woman: I want to get a wallet.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Vorrei ricevere un portafoglio.

#######

Man: It's your birthday next week. What would you like to receive?
Woman: I want to get a wallet.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : J’aimerais avoir un portefeuille.

#######

Man: It's your birthday next week. What would you like to receive?
Woman: I want to get a wallet.

Mujer: Quiero recibir una billetera.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nữ: So với mùa hè nóng nực thì tôi thích mùa đông hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Do you like summer or winter?
Woman: I like winter more than hot summer.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Mi piace più l'inverno che la calda estate.

g_text_audio_translate.en:

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chúng ta sẽ đi bằng xe buýt nhỉ?
Nữ: Không. Chúng ta hãy đi taxi. Taxi nhanh hơn xe buýt.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Shall we take the bus?
Woman: No. Let's take a taxi. The taxi is faster than the bus.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Prendiamo l'autobus?
Donna: No. Prendiamo un taxi. Il taxi è più veloce dell'autobus.

#######

Man: Shall we take the bus?
Woman: No. Let's take a taxi. The taxi is faster than the bus.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Non. Prenons un taxi. Le taxi est plus rapide que le bus.

#######

Man: Shall we take the bus?
Woman: No. Let's take a taxi. The taxi is faster than the bus.

Woman: No. Let's take a taxi. The taxi is faster than the bus.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Sao ngày mai anh không đi học?
Nam: Tôi không đi học vì ngày mai là Ngày Hangeul.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Perché domani non vai a scuola?
Uomo: Non vado a scuola perché è l'Hangeul Day.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Pourquoi tu ne vas pas à l'école demain ?
Homme : Je ne vais pas à l'école parce que c'est le jour du Hangeul.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Por qué no vas a la escuela mañana?
Hombre: No voy a la escuela porque es el día del Hangeul.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Mengapa kamu tidak pergi ke sekolah besok?
Pria: Aku tidak pergi ke sekolah karena ini Hari Hangeul.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 明日はなぜ学校に行かないのですか?
男性: 今日はハングルの日なので学校に行きません。

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Warum gehst du morgen nicht zur Schule?
Mann: Ich gehe nicht zur Schule, weil Hangeul-Tag ist.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你明天为什么不去学校？
男：我不去学校，因为今天是韩文日。

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你明天為什麼不去學校？
男：我不去學校，因為今天是韓文日。

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Мужчина: Я не хожу в школу, потому что сегодня День Хангыля.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

ผู้ชาย: ฉันไม่ไปโรงเรียนเพราะเป็นวันฮันกึล

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Homem: Eu não vou à escola porque é o Dia do Hangeul.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

आदमी: मैं स्कूल नहीं जाता क्योंकि यह हंगेउल दिवस है।

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

Adam: Hangeul Günü olduğu için okula gitmiyorum.

#######

Woman: Why aren't you going to school tomorrow?
Man: I don't go to school because it's Hangeul Day.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 일요일에 제 생일 파티가 있으니까 놀러오세요.
여자: 좋아요. 꼭 갈게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi có tổ chức bữa tiệc sinh nhật vào Chủ nhật, hãy đến chơi nhé.
Nữ: Được rồi. Tôi chắc chắn sẽ đến.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I have a birthday party on Sunday, so come over.
Woman: Okay. I'll be sure to go.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Domenica ho una festa di compleanno, vieni a trovarmi.
Donna: Va bene. Sarò sicuro di andare.

#######

Man: I have a birthday party on Sunday, so come over.
Woman: Okay. I'll be sure to go.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : D’accord. Je serai sûr d'y aller.

#######

Man: I have a birthday party on Sunday, so come over.
Woman: Okay. I'll be sure to go.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 남자친구하고 몇시에 만나기로 했어요?
여자: 두 시에 만나기로 했어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nữ: Chúng tôi quyết định gặp nhau lúc hai giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What time are you and your boyfriend supposed to meet?
Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: A che ora dovete incontrarvi tu e il tuo ragazzo?
Donna: Dovremmo vederci alle due.

#######

Man: What time are you and your boyfriend supposed to meet?
Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À quelle heure êtes-vous censés vous rencontrer avec votre petit ami ?
Femme : Nous sommes censés nous rencontrer à deux heures.

#######

Man: What time are you and your boyfriend supposed to meet?
Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.

Mujer: Se supone que nos reuniremos a las dos.

#######

Man: What time are you and your boyfriend supposed to meet?
Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.

Wanita: Kita seharusnya bertemu jam dua.

Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.

女性: 2時に会うことになっています。

Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.

Woman: We're supposed to meet at two.

Man: There were a lot of sad scenes, but it was interesting.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저는 매일 저녁에 영화를 봐요.
남자: 그래요? 저는 영화보다 드라마를 많이 봐요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi xem phim điện ảnh vào mỗi buổi tối.
Nam: Vậy sao? So với phim điện ảnh thì tôi xem phim truyền hình nhiều hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I watch a movie every evening.
Man: Is it? I watch more dramas than movies.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Guardo un film ogni sera.
Uomo: Davvero? Guardo più drammi che film.

#######

Man: Is it? I watch more dramas than movies.

title: 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 토요일은 일을 안 해서 제일 좋아요.
여자: 저는 토요일에도 일을 해요. 그래서 일요일이 좋아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi thích thứ bảy nhất vì tôi không làm việc vào ngày đó.
Nữ: Tôi làm việc vào cả thứ bảy. Vì vậy tôi thích chủ nhật.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Il sabato è il migliore perché non lavoro.
Donna: Lavoro anche il sabato. Quindi mi piace la domenica.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Les samedis sont les meilleurs parce que je ne travaille pas.
Femme : Je travaille aussi le samedi. Donc j'aime le dimanche.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Los sábados son los mejores porque no trabajo.
Mujer: También trabajo los sábados. Entonces me gustan los domingos.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Hari Sabtu adalah waktu terbaik karena saya tidak bekerja.
Wanita: Saya juga bekerja pada hari Sabtu. Jadi saya suka hari Minggu.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：仕事がないから土曜日が一番いいよ。
女性：土曜日も仕事をしています。だから日曜日が好きです。

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Samstage sind die besten, weil ich nicht arbeite.
Frau: Ich arbeite auch samstags. Also ich mag Sonntage.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.

男：周六最好，因为我不工作。
女：我周六也工作。所以我喜欢周日。

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.

女：我周六也工作。所以我喜歡週日。

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.
Woman: I also work on Saturdays. So I like Sundays.

#######

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.

Man: Saturdays are the best because I don't work.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 저는 이거 매워서 못 먹겠어요.
남자: 그러게요. 너무 맵네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Đúng vậy. Nó quá cay.

Man: Yeah. It's too spicy.

Uomo: Sì. È troppo piccante.

Man: Yeah. It's too spicy.

Man: No. My younger sibling is a girl.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 우리 저기에 앉을까요?
여자: 다음 역에서 내려야 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chúng mình ngồi xuống đây đi?
Nữ: Tôi phải xuống ở ga sau rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Maschio: Ci sediamo laggiù?
Femmina: Devo scendere alla prossima stazione.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Allons-nous nous asseoir là-bas ?
Femme : Je dois descendre à la prochaine station.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Nos sentamos ahí?
Mujer: Tengo que bajarme en la próxima estación.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Laki-laki: Bagaimana kalau kita duduk di sana?
Wanita: Saya harus turun di stasiun berikutnya.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：あそこに座りましょうか。
女性：次の駅で下車しなければなりません。

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sollen wir da drüben sitzen?
Frau: Ich muss an der nächsten Station aussteigen.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我们坐那边好吗？
女：我得在下一站下车。

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我們坐那邊好嗎？
女：我得在下一站下車。

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Может, сядем там?
Женщина: Мне нужно выйти на следующей станции.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: เราไปนั่งตรงนั้นไหม?
หญิง: ต้องลงสถานีถัดไปค่ะ.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Masculino: Vamos sentar aí?
Mulher: Tenho que descer na próxima estação.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
पुरुष: क्या हम वहाँ बैठेंगे?
महिला: मुझे अगले स्टेशन पर उतरना है.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Erkek: Şuraya oturalım mı?
Kadın: Bir sonraki istasyonda inmem lazım.

#######

Male: Shall we sit over there?
Female: I have to get off at the next station.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 머리를 어떻게 해 드릴까요?
남자: 조금만 잘라 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh muốn cắt tóc kiểu nào ạ?
Nam: Chị cắt bớt đi một chút cho tôi nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Femmina: Come vorresti che mi facessero i capelli?
Maschio: Taglialo un po', per favore.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Comment voudriez-vous que mes cheveux soient coiffés ?
Homme : Coupez-le un peu, s'il vous plaît.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo te gustaría que me peinaran?
Hombre: Córtalo un poco, por favor.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana Anda ingin rambut saya ditata?
Pria: Tolong potong sedikit.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：私の髪はどうしますか？
男性：少しカットしてください。

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Weiblich: Wie möchten Sie, dass meine Haare gemacht werden?
Männlich: Schneiden Sie es ein wenig, bitte.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你想怎么弄我的头发？
男：请剪一点。

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你想怎麼弄我的頭髮？
男：請剪一點。

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Как бы вы хотели, чтобы мне сделали прическу?
Мужчина: Сократите это немного, пожалуйста.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณอยากให้ฉันตัดผมทรงไหน?
ชาย: ขอตัดหน่อยนะครับ.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Como você gostaria que meu cabelo fosse penteado?
Masculino: Corte um pouco, por favor.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: आप मेरे बाल कैसे बनाना चाहेंगे?
पुरुष: कृपया इसे थोड़ा काट दीजिए.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Saçımın nasıl yapılmasını istersiniz?
Erkek: Biraz kes lütfen.

#######

Female: How would you like my hair done?
Male: Cut it a little, please.

title: [11~14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 오빠가 있어요? 
여자: 아니요. 언니가 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, do you have an older brother?
Woman: No. I have an older sister.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sumi, bạn có anh trai không?
Nữ: Không. Tớ có chị gái.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
الرجل: سومي، هل لديك أخ أكبر؟
المرأة: لا، لدي أخت أكبر مني.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Суми, у тебя есть старший брат?
Женщина: Нет. У меня есть старшая сестра.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sumi, hast du einen älteren Bruder?
Frau: Nein. Ich habe eine ältere Schwester.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, as-tu un frère aîné ?
Femme : Non. J'ai une sœur aînée.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Sumi, apakah kamu punya kakak laki-laki?
Wanita: Tidak. Saya mempunyai seorang kakak perempuan.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sumi, hai un fratello maggiore?
Donna: No. Ho una sorella maggiore.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: スミさん、お兄さんはいますか?
女性: いいえ、私には姉がいます。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Sumi, você tem um irmão mais velho?
Mulher: Não. Tenho uma irmã mais velha.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ซูมิ คุณมีพี่ชายไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ไม่ ฉันมีพี่สาว
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sumi, ağabeyin var mı?
Kadın: Hayır. Benim bir ablam var.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：Sumi，你有哥哥吗？
女：不，我有一个姐姐。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：Sumi，你有哥哥嗎？
女：不，我有一個姊姊。
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सुमी, क्या तुम्हारा कोई बड़ा भाई है?
महिला: नहीं. मेरी एक बड़ी बहन है.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sumi, ¿tienes un hermano mayor?
Mujer: No. Tengo una hermana mayor.

explain.en:
1. Country
2. Family
3. Name
4. Weekend
--------------------
The two mention older brother and older sister so we can deduce that they are talking about family. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
1. Đất nước
2. Gia đình
3. Tên
4. Cuối tuần
--------------------
Hai nhân vật đề cập đến anh trai và chị gái nên suy ra họ đang nói về gia đình. 2 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar:
1. البلد
2. العائلة
3. الاسم
4. عطلة نهاية الأسبوع
--------------------
يذكر الاثنان الأخ الأكبر والأخت الكبرى حتى نتمكن من استنتاج أنهما يتحدثان عن العائلة. 2 هي الإجابة الصحيحة.
explain.ru:
1. Страна
2. Семья
3. Имя
4. Выходные
--------------------
Эти двое упоминают старшего брата и старшую сестру, поэтому мы можем сделать вывод, что они говорят о семье. 2 правильный ответ.
explain.de:
1. Land
2. Familie
3. Name
4. Wochenende
--------------------
Die beiden erwähnen den älteren Bruder und die ältere Schwester, sodass wir schließen können, dass es sich um die Familie handelt. 2 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr:
1. Pays
2. Famille
3. Nom
4. Week-end
--------------------
Les deux mentionnent un frère aîné et une sœur aînée, nous pouvons donc en déduire qu'ils parlent de famille. 2 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id:
1. Negara
2. Keluarga
3. Nama
4. Akhir pekan
--------------------
Keduanya menyebut kakak laki-laki dan perempuan sehingga kita dapat menyimpulkan bahwa mereka berbicara tentang keluarga. 2 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it:
1. Paese
2. Famiglia
3. Nome
4. Fine settimana
--------------------
I due menzionano il fratello maggiore e la sorella maggiore quindi possiamo dedurre che stiano parlando di famiglia. 2 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja:
1. 国
2. 家族
3. 名前
4. 週末
--------------------
二人は兄と姉について言及しているので、家族について話していると推測できます。 2が正解です。
explain.pt:
1. País
2. Família
3. Nome
4. Fim de semana
--------------------
Os dois mencionam irmão e irmã mais velhos para que possamos deduzir que estão falando de família. 2 é a resposta correta.

2. ครอบครัว

explain.tr:
1. Ülke
2. Aile
3. İsim
4. Hafta Sonu
--------------------
İkisi ağabey ve abladan bahsediyor, böylece aileden bahsettiklerini anlayabiliriz. 2 doğru cevaptır.

1. 国家
2. 家庭
3. 姓名
4. 周末
--------------------
两人提到了哥哥和姐姐，所以我们可以推断他们正在谈论家庭。 2 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW:
1. 國家
2. 家庭
3. 姓名
4. 週末
--------------------
兩人提到了哥哥和姐姐，所以我們可以推斷他們正在談論家庭。 2 是正確答案。
explain.hi:

2. परिवार
3. नाम
4. सप्ताहांत
-------------------
दोनों में बड़े भाई और बड़ी बहन का उल्लेख है ताकि हम यह अनुमान लगा सकें कि वे परिवार के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं। 2 सही उत्तर है.

title: [11~14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 내일 시험이 몇 시예요? 
남자: 두 시예요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What time is the test tomorrow?
Man: Two o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Ngày mai mấy giờ thi nhỉ?
Nam: 2 giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: متى موعد الاختبار غدا؟
الرجل : الساعة الثانية .
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Во сколько завтра экзамен?
Мужчина: Два часа.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Um wie viel Uhr findet morgen der Test statt?
Mann: Zwei Uhr.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : À quelle heure est le test demain ?
Homme : Deux heures.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Besok jam berapa ujiannya?
Pria: Jam dua.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: A che ora è il test domani?
Uomo: Alle due.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 明日のテストは何時ですか?
男性: 2時です。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: A que horas é a prova amanhã?
Homem: Duas horas.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: พรุ่งนี้สอบกี่โมง?
ผู้ชาย : สองทุ่ม
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Yarın sınav saat kaçta?
Adam: Saat ikide.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：明天几点考试？
男：两点了。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：明天幾點考試？
男：兩點了。
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: कल टेस्ट कितने बजे है?
आदमी: दो बजे हैं.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿A qué hora es el examen mañana?
Hombre: A las dos.

explain.en:
1. Hobbies
2. Weather

4. Food
--------------------

explain.vi:

3. Thời gian

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Hello. I am Kim Min-soo.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin chào? Tên tôi là Kim Min-su.
Nữ: Tôi tên là Lee Ji-young.
g_text_audio_translate.ar: الرجل: مرحبًا. أنا كيم مين سو. المرأة: أنا لي جي يونغ.

Мужчина: Здравствуйте. Я Ким Мин Су.

Mann: Hallo. Ich bin Kim Min-soo.
Frau: Ich bin Lee Ji-young.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Je suis Lee Ji-young.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Halo. Saya Kim Min-soo. Wanita: Saya Lee Ji-young.

Donna: Sono Lee Ji-young.

女性：イ・ジヨンです。

Kadın: Ben Lee Ji-young.

Ɔbea: Meyɛ Lee Ji-young.

g_text_audio_translate.ne:

g_text_audio_translate.si:

title: [11~14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우리, 어디에서 만날까요? 
남자: 학교 앞 카페는 어때요?

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Where should we meet?
Man: How about the cafe in front of the school?
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chúng ta nên gặp nhau ở đâu?

Frau: Wo treffen wir uns?
Mann: Wie wäre es mit dem Café vor der Schule?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Où devrions-nous nous retrouver ?
Homme : Que dirais-tu du café en face de l’école ?

Homem: Que tal no café em frente à escola?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง : เราจะนัดเจอกันที่ไหนคะ 
ผู้ชาย : แล้วร้านกาแฟหน้าโรงเรียนล่ะคะ ?

Kadın: Nerede buluşalım?
Erkek: Okulun önündeki kafede ne dersin?

Ɔbarima: Na cafe a ɛwɔ sukuu no anim no nso ɛ?

महिला: हमें कहाँ मिलना चाहिए?
पुरुष: स्कूल के सामने वाले कैफ़े में कैसे रहेंगे?
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: हामी कहाँ भेट्ने?
पुरुष: स्कूल अगाडिको क्याफे कस्तो छ?
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ តើយើងគួរជួបគ្នានៅឯណា?
បុរស៖ ចុះហាងកាហ្វេនៅមុខសាលាវិញ?
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: අපි කොහෙද හමුවෙන්න ඕනේ?
මිනිසා: පාසල ඉදිරිපිට ඇති කැෆේ එක කොහොමද?
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: আমাদের কোথায় দেখা করা উচিত?
পুরুষ: স্কুলের সামনের ক্যাফেটা কেমন?
g_text_audio_translate.my:
မိန်းမ : ငါတို့ ဘယ်မှာ တွေ့သင့်လဲ။
Man : ကျောင်းရှေ့မှာ ကော်ဖီဆိုင်က ဘယ်လိုလဲ။

title: [11~14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 내일 쉬어요? 
여자: 네. 토요일이라서 회사에 안 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, are you off tomorrow?
Woman: Yes. It's Saturday, so I'm not going to work.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sumi, ngày mai bạn có nghỉ không?
Nữ: Có. Vì là thứ bảy nên tôi không đi làm.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
الرجل: سومي، هل أنتِ في إجازة غدًا؟
المرأة: نعم. إنه يوم السبت، لذا لن أذهب إلى العمل.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Суми, ты завтра выходной?
Женщина: Да. Сегодня суббота, так что я не пойду на работу.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sumi, hast du morgen frei?
Frau: Ja. Es ist Samstag, also gehe ich nicht arbeiten.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, tu es libre demain ?
Femme : Oui. C'est samedi, donc je ne vais pas travailler.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Sumi, kamu libur besok? Wanita: Ya. Hari ini Sabtu, jadi aku tidak akan bekerja.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sumi, domani sei libera?
Donna: Sì. È sabato, quindi non andrò a lavorare.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：スミさん、明日は休みですか？
女性：ええ。土曜日なので仕事に行きません。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Sumi, você está de folga amanhã?
Mulher: Sim. É sábado, então não vou trabalhar.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: สุมิ พรุ่งนี้คุณหยุดไหม?
หญิง: ใช่ค่ะ วันนี้เป็นวันเสาร์ ฉันเลยไปทำงานไม่ได้
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sumi, yarın izinli misin?
Kadın: Evet. Cumartesi, bu yüzden çalışmayacağım.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbarima: Sumi, ɔkyena worekɔ?
Ɔbea: Yiw. Ɛyɛ Kwasida, enti merenyɛ adwuma.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सुमी, क्या कल तुम्हारी छुट्टी है?
औरत: हाँ। आज शनिवार है, इसलिए मैं काम पर नहीं जाऊँगी।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
पुरुष: सुमी, तिमी भोलि बिदा छौ?
महिला: हुन्छ। आज शनिबार हो, त्यसैले म काममा जाँदिन।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ស៊ូមី ស្អែកអូនចេញដំណើរទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ។ វាជាថ្ងៃសៅរ៍ ដូច្នេះខ្ញុំមិនទៅធ្វើការទេ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: සුමී, ඔයා හෙට නිවාඩුද?
කාන්තාව: ඔව්. අද සෙනසුරාදා, ඒ නිසා මම වැඩට යන්නේ නැහැ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: সুমি, তুমি কি আগামীকাল ছুটিতে আছো?

মহিলা: হ্যাঁ। আজ শনিবার, তাই আমি কাজে যাব না।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: Sumi နင်မနက်ဖြန်ထွက်မှာလား။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်တယ်။ စနေနေ့ဆိုတော့ အလုပ်မသွားတော့ဘူး။
g_text_audio_translate.es: Hombre: Sumi, ¿tienes libre mañana? Mujer: Sí. Es sábado, así que no voy a trabajar.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：Sumi，你明天休息吗？
女：是的。今天是星期六，所以我不去上班。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：Sumi，你明天休息嗎？
女：是的。今天是星期六，所以我不去上班。

title: [11~14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 봄이 좋아요, 가을이 좋아요? 
남자: 저는 봄이 더 좋아요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsu, do you like spring or fall?
Man: I prefer spring.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsu, anh thích mùa xuân hay mùa thu?
Nam: Tôi thích mùa xuân hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.ar: المرأة: مينسو، هل تُفضّل الربيع أم الخريف؟ الرجل: أُفضّل الربيع.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Минсу, тебе нравится весна или осень?
Мужчина: Я предпочитаю весну.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Minsu, magst du den Frühling oder den Herbst?
Mann: Ich bevorzuge den Frühling.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsu, tu préfères le printemps ou l’automne ?
Homme : Je préfère le printemps.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Wanita: Minsu, kamu lebih suka musim semi atau musim gugur? Pria: Aku lebih suka musim semi.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Minsu, ti piace la primavera o l'autunno?
Uomo: Preferisco la primavera.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：ミンス、春と秋、どちらが好きですか？
男性：僕は春が好きです。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Minsu, você gosta da primavera ou do outono?
Homem: Eu prefiro a primavera.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: มินซู คุณชอบฤดูใบไม้ผลิหรือฤดูใบไม้ร่วง?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันชอบฤดูใบไม้ผลิมากกว่า
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Minsu, ilkbaharı mı yoksa sonbaharı mı seversin?
Erkek: Ben ilkbaharı tercih ederim.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbaa: Minsu, wopɛ ahohuru bere anaa osutɔbere?
Ɔbarima: Mepɛ ahohuru bere.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिंसू, तुम्हें वसंत ऋतु पसंद है या पतझड़?
पुरुष: मुझे वसंत ऋतु पसंद है।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: मिन्सु, तिमीलाई वसन्त मन पर्छ कि शरद?
पुरुष: मलाई वसन्त मन पर्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ មីនស៊ូ តើអ្នកចូលចិត្តរដូវផ្ការីក ឬរដូវស្លឹកឈើជ្រុះ?
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តនិទាឃរដូវ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මින්සු, ඔයා වසන්තයටද සරත් සෘතුවටද කැමති?
මිනිසා: මම වසන්තයට කැමතියි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: মিনসু, তুমি বসন্ত পছন্দ করো না শরৎ?
লোক: আমি বসন্ত পছন্দ করি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
မိန်းမ : Minsu နွေဦး ဒါမှမဟုတ် ဆောင်းရာသီကို ကြိုက်လား။
Man: နွေဦးကို ပိုကြိုက်တယ်။
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Minsu, ¿te gusta la primavera o el otoño?
Hombre: Prefiero la primavera.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：敏秀，你喜欢春天还是秋天？
男：我更喜欢春天。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：敏秀，你喜歡春天還是秋天？
男：我比較喜歡春天。
